data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for follow-up reminders for non-signers, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature or its operational status. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that follow-up reminders are functioning leads to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of follow-up reminders for non-signers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
